content.en:
The Chaos Yuan True Classic is a classic created by the Chaos Yuan Supreme, involving many profound truths, including the explanation and analysis of the Chaos Dao.

Although the Chaos Body Refining Technique is a Chaos Supreme Divine Scripture, it does not have a specific description of the Chaos Dao, which can be regarded as a general outline of cultivation, while the Chaos Yuan True Scripture is too detailed and too detailed.

In addition, the Chaos Body Refining Technique was created by the Chaos Yuan Supreme many years ago, and it was not verified, and after it was created, it was lost to the Supreme Hall of the Human Race.

However, the Mixed Yuan True Classic is different, it is one of the supreme classics of the Mixed Yuan Divine Mountain, and it is often perfected by the Mixed Yuan Supreme, and among the human race, the Mixed Yuan True Classic has a great reputation.

Because of this, Ye Tiancai longed to be able to browse the Mixed Yuan True Classic.

"What, you want to borrow the Mixed Yuan Classic!!"

Li Xin'er was surprised.

The Mixed Yuan True Classic is one of the supreme classics of the Mixed Yuan Divine Mountain, how can ordinary people have such courage to want to borrow the Mixed Yuan True Classic.

If it was usual, the Mixed Yuan Divine Mountain would definitely refuse.

But this time is different, the Mixed Yuan Divine Mountain is in great need of a reincarnation quota.

"Fairy Xin'er, if the Mixed Yuan Divine Mountain is unwilling, then we have a chance to trade again!"

Ye Tian said with a smile.

7 reincarnation quotas, how precious they are, if it is just an unknown chance, he wants to exchange for 7 reincarnation places, then he is too stupid.

If he didn't get more benefits from the Mixed Yuan Divine Mountain, he wouldn't agree to the deal.

Li Xin'er was silent for a while, and suddenly said, "Okay, we have agreed!"

"Agreed?"

Ye Tian's eyes widened and he looked at Li Xin'er in a little surprise.

"Xin'er doesn't need to ask for instructions now?"

Ye Tian asked.

"No need!" Li Xin'er smiled slightly and said, "Lord, I can still do this!"

Ye Tian looked at Li Xin'er deeply, and felt more and more that Li Xin'er's identity was not simple.

It was already very surprising to be able to trade with him on behalf of the Great God-level cultivator, and he could easily make the decision to let Ye Tian browse the Mixed Yuan True Scripture, even if it was the master of the Mixed Yuan Divine Mountain, he didn't have such a right.

"Could it be that he is the descendant of a certain supreme of the Mixed Yuan Divine Mountain?"

Ye Tian guessed.

But there are only two Supremes in the Mixed Yuan Divine Mountain, one of them is the Mixed Yuan Supreme, and the other is an ordinary Supreme.

If it is the junior of the ordinary Supreme, it stands to reason that he does not have such a big right, unless it is the descendant of the Mixed Yuan Supreme, and the relationship is very close, so he has such a right.

"Forget it, it's useless to think too much, it's definitely worth it to exchange 7 places for the opportunity to browse the Chaos Yuan Classic and enter the small world of Chaos!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

After the transaction was successful, Ye Tian directly followed Li Xin'er out of Tianlan Giant City and went to the Mixed Yuan Divine Mountain.

The Mixed Yuan Divine Mountain is not in the main space of the universe, but in a special world, just like the supreme hall of the human race is in the origin realm.

The world where the Mixed Yuan Divine Mountain is located is called the Mixed Yuan Heavenly Realm!

The Mixed Yuan Heavenly Realm is shrouded in a supreme treasure, and ordinary people can't enter the Mixed Yuan Heavenly Realm at all, even if it's a supreme, don't want to sneak into the Mixed Yuan Heavenly Realm easily.

And ordinary people can't enter the Mixed Yuan Heavenly Realm without permission.

Now, under the leadership of Li Xin'er, Ye Tian easily entered the Mixed Yuan Heavenly Realm.

Mixed Yuan Heavenly Realm, Mixed Yuan Divine Mountain.

This is an unimaginable sacred mountain, almost comparable in size to the supreme mountain of the relic world.

Ye Tian did not enter the top of the Mixed Yuan Divine Mountain, but waited at the bottom of the mountain.

No matter how great Li Xin'er's power is, she can't bring an outsider into the headquarters of the Mixed Yuan Divine Mountain, and she still needs to ask the high-level of the Mixed Yuan Divine Mountain.

Soon, Li Xin'er appeared in front of Ye Tian again.

"Your Highness Wanfa, come with me, I'll take you to browse the Mixed Yuan True Classic first. Remember, you can only browse, and you must take an oath not to divulge the contents of the Mixed Element Classic!"

Li Xin'er admonished.

"That's for sure!"

Ye Tian nodded and agreed.

Rushing!!

Li Xin'er took Ye Tian through a patch of areas, stepped into a large number of buildings, and finally came to an incomparably brilliant temple.

This temple is the Wandian Temple of the Mixed Yuan Divine Mountain, and at first glance, you can tell that this is the place where the classics are stored, and the Mixed Yuan True Classics are stored in this temple.

Li Xin'er took Ye Tian into the Wandian Temple, and along the way, everyone respectfully called Li Xin'er the young master.

"Young master?"

Ye Tian was extremely surprised when he heard such a title.

This title is not called nonsense, in a place like the Mixed Yuan Divine Mountain, only the heirs of the mountain lord of the Mixed Yuan Divine Mountain, and must be the first heir, can be called the young master, and other heirs cannot be called so.

"She is the daughter of the Mountain Lord of the Mixed Yuan Divine Mountain!"

Ye Tian was completely stunned by this news.

"As far as I know, the mountain master of the Mixed Yuan Divine Mountain should be the fourth son of the Mixed Yuan Supreme, and the one with the highest talent, although he is not the Supreme now, but he is in the Heavenly Venerable realm, and he is not far from becoming the Supreme. No wonder Li Xin'er has such great power, the daughter of the mountain lord of the Mixed Yuan Divine Mountain, the granddaughter of the Supreme of the Mixed Yuan, such a high status!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Although Li Xin'er was the young master of the Mixed Yuan Divine Mountain, Ye Tian didn't have the idea of currying favor.

As the only son of the era of the human race and even the entire universe, even if he does not have the combat power of the son of the era who has reached the true god level, after all, he has become the son of the era of the god level, so he is still the son of the era!

As the Son of the Epoch, he doesn't need to please anyone.

Besides, if he is allowed to grow up all the time, it will be a matter of time before he surpasses the Mixed Yuan Supreme.

Therefore, Ye Tian did not need to please Li Xin'er.

Soon, Li Xin'er took Ye Tian to a large hall.

"Your Highness Wanfa, the Mixed Yuan True Scripture is on the shelf of this hall, remember not to make too many small moves, there are powerhouses above the Universe God here!"

Li Xin'er reminded.

"Don't worry!"

Ye Tian nodded slightly.

His copying talent has long understood the layout here, and the surrounding space is full of cosmic god powerhouses, and there are even masters hiding around, without Li Xin'er reminding him.

There was an old man in the main hall, sitting there.

When the old man saw Ye Tian walk in, he said, "You are His Highness the Ten Thousand Laws of the Supreme Hall of the Human Race, leave an oath first, and then go to browse the Mixed Yuan True Scripture!"

The old man said.

"Yes, Senpai!"

Ye Tian said to the old man.

Judging from the situation of the copy talent, this old man is a master!

And definitely the most powerful of the kind, not a small one like the Dark One.

It is not unreasonable for Ye Tian to call a powerful master a senior.

Soon, Ye Tian made an oath, walked to the shelf of the main hall, and picked up a golden book.

This golden book is the Mixed Yuan True Canon, and there is a ban on it, but the moment he picked it up, the old man waved his hand and lifted the ban, so that Ye Tian could browse it with peace of mind.

So, Ye Tian flipped through the Mixed Yuan Classics and browsed them little by little.
